creator: ru@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Tue, Apr 21, 2009 at 11:41:23AM -0300, Joao Rocha Braga Filho wrote:
> 2009/4/21 Ruslan Ermilov <ru@freebsd.org>:
> > On Tue, Apr 21, 2009 at 01:11:05PM +0000, JoĂŁo Rocha Braga Filho wrote:
> >> >Number: Âš Âš Âš Âš 133892
> >> >Category: Âš Âš Âš kern
> >> >Synopsis: Âš Âš Âš /usr/src/sys/dev/ath/if_ath.c:3414: error: 'const struct ath_rx_status' has no member named 'rs_flags'
> >> >Confidential: Âš no
> >> >Severity: Âš Âš Âš critical
> >> >Priority: Âš Âš Âš medium
> >> >Responsible: Âš Âšfreebsd-bugs
> >> >State: Âš Âš Âš Âš Âšopen
> >> >Quarter:
> >> >Keywords:
> >> >Date-Required:
> >> >Class: Âš Âš Âš Âš Âšsw-bug
> >> >Submitter-Id: Âš current-users
> >> >Arrival-Date: Âš Tue Apr 21 13:20:00 UTC 2009
> >> >Closed-Date:
> >> >Last-Modified:
> >> >Originator: Âš Âš JoĂŁo Rocha Braga Filho
> >> >Release: Âš Âš Âš ÂšFreeBSD 7.1 AMD64
> >> >Organization:
> >> Paraty.com
> >> >Environment:
> >> FreeBSD super.paraty.com 7.1-STABLE FreeBSD 7.1-STABLE #1: Wed Feb 11 18:11:05 BRST 2009 Âš Âš root@super.paraty.com:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/SUPER Âšamd64
> >>
> >> >Description:
> >> I've made csup to the latest version, RELENG_7, "made buildkernel", and happened this:
> >>
> >> "
> >> cc -c -O2 -frename-registers -pipe -fno-strict-aliasing -march=athlon64 -std=c99 -g -Wall -Wredundant-decls -Wnested-externs -Wstrict-prototypes Âš-Wmissing-prototypes -Wpointer-arith -Winline -Wcast-qual Âš-Wundef -Wno-pointer-sign -fformat-extensions -nostdinc Âš-I. -I/usr/src/sys -I/usr/src/sys/contrib/altq -D_KERNEL -DHAVE_KERNEL_OPTION_HEADERS -include opt_global.h -fno-common -finline-limit=8000 --param inline-unit-growth=100 --param large-function-growth=1000 Âš-mcmodel=kernel -mno-red-zone Âš-mfpma th=387 -mno-sse -mno-sse2 -mno-mmx -mno-3dnow Âš-msoft-float -fno-asynchronous-unwind-tables -ffreestanding -Werror Âš/usr/src/sys/dev/ath/if_ath.c -I/usr/src/sys/dev/ath
> >> /usr/src/sys/dev/ath/if_ath.c: In function 'ath_rx_tap':
> >> /usr/src/sys/dev/ath/if_ath.c:3414: error: 'const struct ath_rx_status' has no member named 'rs_flags'
> >> /usr/src/sys/dev/ath/if_ath.c:3416: error: 'const struct ath_rx_status' has no member named 'rs_flags'
> >> *** Error code 1
> >>
> >> Stop in /usr/obj/usr/src/sys/SUPER.
> >> *** Error code 1
> >>
> > I've reported this to Sam a while ago. ÂšThe solution exists, but is not
> > immediate (not in SVN/CVS yet). ÂšIn the mean time you can do:
> >
> > rm -rf /usr/obj
> >
> > Then your buildkernel will complete successfully.
> 
> Thanks, but...
> 
> didn't worked.
> 
> I will wait a while.
> 
Then please add "options AH_SUPPORT_AR5416" to your kernel config.
It's actually not optional now, due to above mentioned problem.


Cheers,
-- 
Ruslan Ermilov
ru@FreeBSD.org
FreeBSD committer
